title: Menus - Linking two different menus in the kiosk (Eat-in or Takeaway)
workflow_title: Linking two different menus in the kiosk (Eat-in or Takeaway)

steps.caption: Welcome. This guide shows how to link two different menus in the kiosk for Eat-in or Takeaway.
In the Backoffice, open Products and click Menus, then + Add menu.
Enter a name and tick the Derived menu checkbox.
Choose the base menu and store to derive from (e.g. Kiosk), then Save.
Repeat to create the second derived menu (e.g. Takeaway).
Open General then Facilities, and click the pencil to edit a facility.
In the facility's Menu setting, select the created menu as the POS menu, then Save.
Expand the establishment to reach the second facility (Eat-in) and repeat the menu setting.
Open Self-service then Sales channels, edit the ordering kiosk, and set the fulfilment options to the desired facilities.
Open the General menu (General then General) and click Send to transmit your changes.
